title: Strict Exit Blocked Payload
description: Schema for the strict-exit gate blocked payload emitted when PolicyMode.principal_strict is active and one or more critical criteria fail.

blocked.description: True when at least one criterion has verdict 'blocked'.

reason_codes.description: Deduplicated reason codes emitted by the evaluation (excludes 'none').

criterion_key.description: Unique key identifying the pass_criteria entry.

critical.description: Whether this criterion is critical (blocking when failed in strict mode).

verdict.description: Evaluation verdict per the blocking-grade decision matrix.

detail.description: Human-readable detail about the evaluation outcome.
